belier.intro: The waning Aquarius Moon moves through your house of friendships and future visions, casting a cool, illuminating light on your social world. Pluto, retrograding through this same sky, asks which group alliances are genuinely transforming you and which ones merely keep you comfortable. With Mercury moving backward through your domestic realm, the past sends signals through the people you trust most.
belier.love: Your heart pulls in a slightly unusual direction today, drawn to intellectual connection over purely emotional closeness. An old friendship may edge toward something deeper, or a past conversation with someone dear resurfaces with new meaning. Allow your feelings to breathe before making any declarations.
belier.work: The energy supports collaborative thinking and revisiting group projects with fresh eyes. You may find that a team effort needs to be restructured, or that collective goals have quietly shifted. Let the Aquarian Moon help you see the full picture before you act.
belier.energy: Your fire burns with a cerebral edge today, channeled through the electric current of the Aquarius Moon. Avoid scattered output by focusing on one innovative idea or conversation that genuinely sparks your enthusiasm.
belier.intuition: Your gut feelings arrive through your social antennae, reading the unspoken dynamics of your circle with unusual precision. Trust the subtle sense of which alliances are worth deepening and which have quietly run their course.
belier.mantra: I choose the connections that light up my future.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The waning Aquarius Moon casts its light on the peak of your chart, illuminating your professional reputation and long-term ambitions. With Pluto retrograding through this same zone, the structures of power around your career are undergoing a slow, deep renovation you can sense but not quite name. Mercury's backward drift in the fertile waters of Cancer adds a nostalgic lens to your self-image.
taureau.love: Old expectations in your closest relationships surface like slow tides; rather than clinging to them, consider which ones still serve the bond you are building together. Emotional security and steadiness are closely linked in your heart today, and the way your partner values what you value is its own form of intimacy.
taureau.work: A professional matter demands your full, unhurried attention. This is a day for reviewing your trajectory and recalibrating your public goals, not for announcing a new initiative. The Aquarian Moon rewards original thinking applied to lasting structures.
taureau.energy: Your earthy endurance finds an unusual ally in the electric Aquarian current. Channel this into methodical progress rather than impulsive leaps, and you will surprise yourself with how far a single sustained effort carries you.
taureau.intuition: Your instinct for long-term value sharpens under this Moon. A hunch about your professional direction deserves more than a passing thought; write it down and examine it carefully.
taureau.mantra: I build my legacy one deliberate step at a time.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Aquarius Moon drifts through your house of philosophy and distant horizons, awakening a hunger for ideas that reach beyond your usual boundaries. Your ruler Mercury is retrograding through Cancer, tethering your adventurous mind to emotional memories and unfinished conversations from the past. The tension between wandering freely and returning to something half-understood is the creative gift of this day.
gemeaux.love: Love feels like a conversation about meaning today, a shared exploration of beliefs rather than surface-level exchange. A philosophical difference with someone close may emerge, inviting you both to understand rather than to persuade.
gemeaux.work: A project connected to learning, publishing, or long-distance communication benefits from your curious attention. Review the conceptual foundations of a plan rather than adding more detail on top. The clearest insights come from stepping back.
gemeaux.energy: Your mental agility is high but tends to scatter like starlight. Anchor each thought in a single, purposeful inquiry and you will avoid the restlessness that can drain you.
gemeaux.intuition: A sudden conviction about the right direction appears, almost too large to trust. Let it settle for a day before you act on it; the Aquarius Moon loves ideas that hold up under scrutiny.
gemeaux.mantra: I follow the thread of truth wherever it leads.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Aquarius Moon illuminates the most hidden and transformative chamber of your chart, the zone of shared resources, deep intimacy, and profound change. With your ruler Mercury retrograding through your own sign, you are simultaneously receiving messages from your past and sensing the current of change beneath your present life. This is a rare invitation to examine what you are truly ready to release.
cancer.love: The boundary between what is yours and what belongs to your partnership feels especially charged today. A conversation about shared finances or emotional debts may arise; approach it with directness softened by tenderness. Real intimacy is built in these honest, difficult moments.
cancer.work: A financial arrangement or matter involving shared resources warrants a closer look. Do not sign anything new or make commitments that cannot be undone. Instead, review the terms of what already exists and look for where clarity has been missing.
cancer.energy: The pull inward is strong and should not be resisted. Your regenerative power works best when you allow yourself quiet intervals today, even amid the demands of the ordinary world.
cancer.intuition: Your capacity to sense the hidden motivations of others is especially acute. The Pluto retrograde and the Aquarius Moon combine to offer you an x-ray view of social dynamics; use this gently and wisely.
cancer.mantra: I release what no longer nourishes me and make space for what does.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Aquarius Moon, opposite your sign, shines its full waning light across your relationship axis, making the dynamics of your most important partnerships impossible to ignore. Pluto's retrograde motion through this zone has been slowly dismantling and rebuilding the very foundations of how you connect with others. Mercury, moving backward in your private twelfth house, brings whispers from the past to the surface of your consciousness.
lion.love: This is a day when the mirror of relationship shows you something true and perhaps unexpected about yourself. Resist the temptation to deflect what you see. A partner's perspective, even if it stings slightly, contains a gift of self-knowledge worth receiving.
lion.work: Collaborations and negotiations require careful navigation today. Revisit the terms of existing agreements rather than rushing toward new ones. The Aquarius Moon favors fairness and innovation over tradition, so consider approaches that serve both parties equally.
lion.energy: The opposing lunar energy can feel like a tug-of-war between your natural instinct to shine independently and the genuine need to meet someone halfway. Find the middle ground and your vitality will surprise you.
lion.intuition: Your intuition today speaks through your relationships, reflecting your inner world back to you through the reactions and choices of others. Pay close attention to what consistently mirrors back.
lion.mantra: I see myself clearly in the mirror of those I love.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Aquarius Moon casts a fresh, analytical light across your house of daily work and physical well-being, shaking up routines that may have grown too comfortable. With Pluto retrograding through this same space, deeper patterns in how you serve others and manage your body are being slowly excavated. Mercury's backward path in Cancer adds an emotional layer to your usually rational approach to health and duty.
vierge.love: Your devotion expresses itself through thoughtful acts of care today, the kind that go unannounced. Resist the urge to analyze your connections too closely and simply offer your presence as the gift it is.
vierge.work: This Aquarian Moon urges you to find more efficient and inventive approaches to your daily tasks. A system that has served you well may be ready for an upgrade. Look for the one change that would free up the most energy and make it.
vierge.energy: Your stamina is reliable, but the Aquarius current asks you not to burn it on routine alone. Reserve some vitality for exploring a new idea or method that genuinely excites you.
vierge.intuition: Your body is speaking more loudly than usual today, sending clear messages about what it needs. Listen before your analytical mind overrides what your physical self already knows.
vierge.mantra: I care for myself with the same devotion I give to others.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The waning Aquarius Moon dances through your house of creativity, romance, and pure joy, bringing a sparkling and slightly unpredictable energy to your pleasures. The tension between spontaneous delight and measured emotional investment is palpable under this sky. Pluto's retrograde in this zone has been quietly asking which creative outlets truly feed your soul.
balance.love: Romance under the Aquarius Moon has a playful, experimental quality. Someone who makes you laugh and think simultaneously holds a special appeal today. Mercury retrograde in Cancer may also stir old feelings about a past flirtation or an unresolved creative chapter with someone dear.
balance.work: A creative project benefits enormously from your willingness to experiment without attachment to the outcome. Let the Aquarian Moon blow fresh air through your habitual approaches. The unexpected angle is often the right one.
balance.energy: The fifth house energy lifts your spirits and lightens your step. Protect this playful vitality by steering clear of situations that demand heavy emotional labor.
balance.intuition: Your creative instinct is your most reliable oracle today. The image, melody, or idea that arrives unbidden in a quiet moment contains more wisdom than any methodical plan.
balance.mantra: I let joy be my compass today.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Aquarius Moon illuminates the deep foundation of your existence, your home, your roots, and the lineage that shaped you. Pluto retrograding through this sector means that what you thought was solid is being quietly transformed from beneath. Mercury's backward dance in Cancer brings ancestral whispers and old domestic memories crowding into your present-day awareness.
scorpion.love: The home itself becomes a place of emotional reckoning today. Conversations with family members or a partner about shared living arrangements may revisit unresolved territory. Speak from the place that seeks understanding, not the place that scores points.
scorpion.work: Your power today flows from private preparation and behind-the-scenes restructuring. Avoid public declarations; instead, use this inward Aquarian Moon to rebuild the interior architecture of your long-term plans.
scorpion.energy: You may feel the weight of unprocessed ancestral patterns sitting heavily in your body. Grounding exercises, time outdoors, and physical stillness are your most potent restoratives.
scorpion.intuition: Your psychic receptivity is deepened by the emotional memories the Moon is stirring. A dream from recent nights, or a sudden image that rises while you are quiet, carries information worth taking seriously.
scorpion.mantra: My roots hold me steady as I transform.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Aquarius Moon courses through your house of communication and local connections, sparking a need to exchange ideas and make meaning through conversation. With Pluto retrograding through this sector, the way you communicate your truth is undergoing a slow but thorough overhaul. Mercury's backward movement in Cancer, meanwhile, brings old conversations back for a second reading.
sagittaire.love: A message, conversation, or written exchange with someone you care about takes on unexpected depth today. Words said and unsaid in the recent past are ready to be revisited and reinterpreted with greater generosity.
sagittaire.work: Correspondence, writing, and short-distance logistics receive helpful clarity from the Aquarian Moon. This is an ideal day for reviewing a document, drafting a proposal with fresh language, or having an unconventional brainstorm with a trusted colleague.
sagittaire.energy: Your restless fire finds a productive outlet in movement and conversation. A brisk walk while mulling over a thought-provoking idea or a spirited debate with a friend are both perfectly matched to your energy today.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition arrives through a chance remark or an overheard phrase that lands with unexpected precision. Stay alert to the messages woven into ordinary exchanges.
sagittaire.mantra: I say what is true and listen for what is real.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Aquarius Moon passes through your house of material resources and personal values, illuminating the relationship between what you own and who you are. With Pluto completing its long retrograde through this sector, a fundamental reexamination of your financial foundations is quietly reaching its conclusion. Mercury retrograding in Cancer casts a sentimental light on questions of what truly matters to you.
capricorne.love: A conversation about shared finances or long-term plans surfaces with unexpected warmth. The way your partner values the things you value is its own form of intimacy, and today that resonance is especially tangible.
capricorne.work: A financial review or budget assessment is well-starred by this Aquarius Moon. You may discover an innovative approach to a longstanding concern, or see clearly where resources have been quietly leaking away. Trust the unconventional solution.
capricorne.energy: Your endurance is formidable today, best applied to careful and methodical work. Resist the impulse to push past natural stopping points; pacing yourself is the wiser discipline.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition speaks in the language of value today, signaling with unmistakable certainty what is worth your energy and what is not. Listen to what that quiet voice keeps returning to.
capricorne.mantra: I invest in what holds lasting worth.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon moves through your own sign today, a direct and personal transit that illuminates your sense of self with cool, electric clarity. At 89% illumination in its waning phase, this is a moment for releasing an old self-concept rather than asserting a new one. Your ruler Pluto continues its retrograde through Aquarius, asking which parts of your identity you are ready to transform at the deepest level.
verseau.love: Your need for emotional freedom and your desire for genuine intimacy exist in delicate balance today. A partner who understands that you need space to think is a rare and valuable presence; let them know you see this gift clearly.
verseau.work: Original ideas flow through you with unusual ease, but the retrograde sky is not ideal for launching them publicly. Write everything down, sketch out the vision, and let it ripen until Mercury turns direct.
verseau.energy: The lunar transit through your own sign can feel either exhilarating or exhausting depending on how aligned you are with your core truth. If you feel depleted, it is a signal to shed something that has outlived its usefulness.
verseau.intuition: You are reading the room at a frequency others cannot access today. Use this heightened perception to understand rather than to judge, and it will serve you remarkably well.
verseau.mantra: I release what no longer reflects who I am becoming.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The waning Aquarius Moon slips through your most hidden and solitary house, a liminal space between waking life and the vast interior ocean you carry within. At 89% illumination, the Moon is releasing its charge, and in your twelfth house this feels like a quiet invitation to let go of accumulated emotional weight. Mercury retrograde in Cancer amplifies the dreaming and remembering quality of this retreat.
poissons.love: Love today asks for nothing more than presence and compassion offered without agenda. A relationship that has been testing you quietly may clarify itself in a moment of shared silence. Let old resentments dissolve rather than harden.
poissons.work: The best work today happens away from the spotlight, in the private creative space where your imagination roams most freely. A project that requires solitary inspiration and compassionate insight is perfectly suited to this energy.
poissons.energy: Your sensitivity is heightened to a delicate and beautiful degree. Honor it by building in solitude, rest, and contact with water or music. Overstimulation is your only real risk today.
poissons.intuition: The veil between your conscious mind and your deepest knowing is gossamer-thin today. Pay close attention to the imagery that arises during meditation, daydreaming, or at the edge of sleep.
poissons.mantra: I rest in the quiet and receive what only silence can give.
poissons.author: Sibylle
